cardDescription: Enter your username and password to access the dashboard.
toastSuccess: You have been logged in successfully.
forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
resetLinkSent: If this email is registered, you will receive a password reset link.
passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can now log in.
invalidResetLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
